description_long: This is a rustic wooden cabin with a steeply pitched gable roof covered in reddish-brown tiles. The front facade features a small set of stairs leading up to a covered porch, supported by wooden posts and adorned with simple decorative trim. A single window is present on the front, next to a central door, while the sides and rear are mostly solid wood with minimal openings. A prominent stone chimney rises along one side, suggesting the presence of a fireplace inside. The cabin sits on a low stone foundation, elevating it slightly above the ground. The overall appearance is weathered and traditional, evoking a rural or historical setting.
description: A rustic wooden cabin with a red-tiled gable roof, front porch, and stone chimney, set on a low stone foundation. The design is simple and traditional, with minimal windows and decorative woodwork.
description_view_0: Front view showing the covered porch, central door, single window, and decorative wood trim.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the long, uninterrupted wooden wall and the full expanse of the red-tiled roof.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain wooden wall with no windows or doors, and the gable roof structure.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the prominent stone chimney and the side of the porch structure.
attribute_roof_type: gable roof with moderate overhangs, covered in reddish-brown tiles, featuring a central ridge and decorative wooden trim at the gable ends
attribute_window_arrangement: one medium-sized rectangular window on the front facade, positioned to the left of the door; no other windows visible on the sides or rear
attribute_door_placement: single exterior door centered on the front facade, accessed via the porch steps
